subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who seeketh shelter beneath the shade of the Branch of God, his Lord, and the Lord of the Throne and the Lord of the worlds. O My Branch, be thou like unto the clouds of springtime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن استظل فی ظل غصن الله ربه و رب العرش و رب العالمین غصنی کن سحاب ربیع
